socketedItems.secDescrText: Create a wall of fire for a duration, which deals burning damage to everything in its area. socketedItems.secDescrText: Wave your wand to create a hovering kinetic projectile. After a short duration, the projectile is fired at an enemy, dealing area damage on impact and chaining to further targets. Using this attack again will reset the duration for all hovering projectiles. Multiple projectiles fired in sequence will attempt to target different enemies. Cannot be directly used by traps or mines.
